summary:
Perfect! The fix is working. The test now passes with only 2 database queries instead of the N+1 problem that would have occurred before. The key changes were:

1. Updated `context.ts` to include DataLoader instances in the context
2. Updated `userResolver.ts` to use the shared loaders from context instead of creating new ones
3. Updated `postResolver.ts` to use the shared loaders from context instead of creating new ones

This ensures that all resolvers within a single request share the same DataLoader instances, allowing batching to work properly across the full query tree.
